creator: count@211.ru
text:
Update to version 0.6.1


0.6.1 release introduces support for platforms:

    * Alcatel.TIMOS
    * DLink.DxS
    * DLink.DES2108
    * HP.ProCurve9xxx,

contains a lot of stability fixes and usability improvements in Service Activation, Fault and VC management.

Configuration management gots pluggable support for config validation and smart configuration filtering (via pyRules).
